Class Registration.Registrar<T extends Registration.Registrar<T>>

java.lang.Object
com.github.shanebeee.skr.Registration.Registrar<T>
Type Parameters:
T - Type of registrar
Direct Known Subclasses:
Registration.ConditionRegistrar, Registration.EffectRegistrar, Registration.EventRegistrar, Registration.EventValueRegistrar, Registration.ExpressionRegistrar, Registration.FunctionRegistrar, Registration.SectionRegistrar, Registration.StructureRegistrar, Registration.TypeRegistrar
Enclosing class:
Registration
public class Registration.Registrar<T extends Registration.Registrar<T>> extends Object
Base Registrar for all Skript element registrations.

  • Method Details

    • noDoc

      public T noDoc()
      Exclude docs for this syntax.
      Returns:
      This registrar for chaining.

    • docIdOverride

      public T docIdOverride(String id)
      Set a doc override ID.

      By default, docs will id as <addon_name:type:syntax_name>. This method will override the default ID.

      Parameters:
      id - ID to override
      Returns:
      This registrar for chaining.
